message:
fix: prevent right-aligned toggles from jumping when items selected

Root cause: lipgloss styling changes rendered width of titles, causing
right-aligned toggles to shift position when focus styling applied.

Solution:
- Set fixed Width(40) on titleStyle regardless of focus state
- Remove %-40s width formatting from sprintf (lipgloss handles width)
- Ensures title always takes exactly 40 characters whether styled or not
- Keeps toggles perfectly right-aligned at consistent position

Before:
  Unfocused: "SSH keys                    OFF" (natural width)
  Focused:   "> SSH keys                 OFF"  (bold styling changes width)

After:
  Unfocused: "SSH keys                    OFF" (fixed 40-char width)
  Focused:   "> SSH keys                  OFF" (fixed 40-char width)

This maintains perfect right-alignment of toggles regardless of focus state.

🤖 Generated with Claude Code
